---
title: "New Blog"
description: "New Post description"
author: "Rob Taylor"
date: "5/22/2026"
date-format: "d-M-yyyy"
draft: false
categories:
  - statistics
  - Bayesian
  - analysis
---

## Introduction

This is an introduction

And now here is some math:

$$
D(\theta) = \frac{e^{i\theta}}{I(0)}
$$
